# MuleSoft Cryptography Module

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.1) of Cryptography Module documentation.
> See [Cryptography Module llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/cryptography-module/llms-full.txt) for all the Cryptography Module documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Cryptography Module - Additional Configuration](https://docs.mulesoft.com/cryptography-module/latest/cryptography-module-additional-configuration.md)
- [Cryptography Module Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/cryptography-module/latest/cryptography-module-examples.md)
- [Configuring JCE Cryptography](https://docs.mulesoft.com/cryptography-module/latest/cryptography-module-jce.md)
- [Configuring PGP Cryptography](https://docs.mulesoft.com/cryptography-module/latest/cryptography-module-pgp.md)
- [Cryptography Module Reference 2.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/cryptography-module/latest/cryptography-module-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Cryptography Module 2.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/cryptography-module/latest/cryptography-module-studio-configuration.md)
- [Troubleshooting Cryptography Module](https://docs.mulesoft.com/cryptography-module/latest/cryptography-module-troubleshooting.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating Cryptography Module 2.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/cryptography-module/latest/cryptography-module-upgrade.md)
- [Configuring XML Cryptography](https://docs.mulesoft.com/cryptography-module/latest/cryptography-module-xml.md)
- [Cryptography Module XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/cryptography-module/latest/cryptography-xml-maven.md)
- [Cryptography Module](https://docs.mulesoft.com/cryptography-module/latest/index.md)
